name: hanhwa_final
description: 루트에서 백엔드·프론트(·AI) 개발 서버를 한 번에 실행

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,ai -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node scripts/run-ai-server.mjs"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
